blocks.text: Australia visa ban → **Iran** (my #4, 0.10, war context) +12.6! But Latvia drone → **Ukraine** (I had Russia 0.45 — a Ukrainian drone that crossed Russian airspace; overconfidence) -24.3. TW **1828.93** (day 90, ~96% resolved, 14 active). Even "defensible" 0.45 picks miss — the overconfidence lesson holds to the end. Advancing.
